# Immanuel Kant

1724 – 1804

Kant was a German philosopher who taught for many years at the University of Koenigsberg. He made pivotal contributions to the study of ethics and epistemology and was a leading figure in the German Enlightenment.

See the **Liberty Matters online discussion** on [Limited Government, Unlimited Liberalism. Or, How Benjamin Constant was a Kantian After All](https://oll.libertyfund.org/page/lm-constant)

**For more information** see the [Biographical Essay](https://oll.libertyfund.org/page/kant-immanuel-1724-1804-5370b041-269c-4e5c-af6e-661b31fce167) .
